amendatorysection.catchline: Land-management burning; fire chief of local fire department; designate member of department; share powers and duties.
amendatorysection.para: The fire chief of a local fire department may designate a member of the local fire department to share the powers and duties of the fire chief under sections 81-520.01 to 81-520.05, except adopting standards pursuant to subsection (4) of section 81-520.01.
